title.zh: 中药面膜美容：古方养颜的智慧
title.en: Herbal Mask Beauty: Ancient Wisdom for Skin Care

description.zh: 掌握中药面膜的制作和使用方法，用古方养颜智慧呵护肌肤
description.en: Master herbal mask making and usage, use ancient wisdom for skincare

zh.text: 中药面膜是中医美容的传统方法，使用天然中药材制作面膜，温和养肤、安全有效。古代宫廷美容方流传至今，蕴含着深厚的养颜智慧。

items: 天然安全：不含化学添加剂
温和养肤：不刺激皮肤
标本兼治：从根源改善皮肤
个性化：可根据体质调配
历史悠久：传承千年智慧
经济实惠：材料易得

zh.text: 玉容散是古代宫廷美容洗面方，可细腻肌肤、美白淡斑。

items: 组成：白芷、白术、白茯苓、白芍等
功效：美白淡斑，细腻肌肤
用法：研末调水洗面或做面膜
适合：面色暗沉、色斑者

zh.text: 三白粉是美白养颜的经典方。

items: 组成：白芷、白术、白茯苓
功效：美白提亮，淡化色斑
用法：研末调蜂蜜或牛奶做面膜
适合：面色暗沉、黄褐斑者

zh.text: 珍珠粉是古代养颜珍品。

items: 组成：珍珠粉
功效：细腻肌肤，美白养颜
用法：调蜂蜜或牛奶做面膜
适合：皮肤粗糙、面色暗沉者

zh.title: 美白淡斑面膜
zh.instructions:
1. 将所有粉末混合
2. 加入蜂蜜调成糊状
3. 涂于面部，避开眼周
4. 15-20分钟后洗净
5. 每周2-3次
6. 美白淡斑，提亮肤色

zh.title: 清热祛痘面膜
zh.instructions:
1. 将所有粉末混合
2. 加水调成糊状
3. 涂于痘痘部位
4. 10-15分钟后洗净
5. 每周2-3次
6. 清热解毒，祛痘消炎

zh.title: 滋润养肤面膜
zh.instructions:
1. 将所有粉末混合
2. 加入蜂蜜和牛奶调成糊状
3. 涂于面部
4. 15-20分钟后洗净
5. 每周2-3次
6. 滋润养肤，改善干燥

zh.title: 抗衰老养颜面膜
zh.instructions:
1. 将所有粉末混合
2. 加入蜂蜜调成糊状
3. 涂于面部
4. 15-20分钟后洗净
5. 每周1-2次
6. 抗衰老，养颜美容

zh.text: 中药面膜使用注意事项

items: 清洁面部：面膜前先清洁
避开眼周：眼部皮肤敏感
时间适当：15-20分钟为宜
频率适度：每周2-3次
过敏测试：首次使用先测试
配合内调：内外兼修效果佳
选择优质中药材：质量保证
研磨细腻：粉末越细越好
保存干燥：防止受潮变质
新鲜调配：不宜存放太久
个人体质：根据体质选择材料

zh.text: 温馨提示：中药面膜需要根据个人体质和皮肤状况选择。首次使用建议做过敏测试。皮肤敏感或有炎症者不宜使用。建议在中医师指导下选择合适的面膜方。

en.text: Herbal masks are a traditional TCM beauty method, using natural herbs to make masks for gentle, safe, effective skincare. Ancient palace beauty formulas passed down through generations contain profound beauty wisdom.

items: Natural & safe: No chemical additives
Gentle skincare: Non-irritating
Root-symptom treatment: Improves skin from source
Personalized: Can be adjusted by constitution
Historical heritage: Thousand-year wisdom
Economical: Materials easily available

en.text: Yu Rong San is an ancient palace beauty wash formula, refining skin texture and whitening.

items: Composition: Angelica dahurica, Atractylodes, Poria, Peony, etc.
Effect: Whitens, fades spots, refines skin
Usage: Powder mixed with water for washing or mask
Suitable for: Dull complexion, spots

en.text: San Bai Powder is a classic whitening formula.

items: Composition: Angelica dahurica, Atractylodes, Poria
Effect: Whitens, brightens, fades spots
Usage: Powder mixed with honey or milk for mask
Suitable for: Dull complexion, melasma

en.text: Pearl powder is an ancient beauty treasure.

items: Composition: Pearl powder
Effect: Refines skin, whitens
Usage: Mixed with honey or milk for mask
Suitable for: Rough skin, dull complexion

en.title: Whitening Spot-Fading Mask
en.instructions:
1. Mix all powders
2. Add honey to form paste
3. Apply to face, avoid eye area
4. Rinse after 15-20 minutes
5. 2-3 times weekly
6. Whitens, fades spots, brightens skin

en.title: Heat-Clearing Acne Mask
en.instructions:
1. Mix all powders
2. Add water to form paste
3. Apply to acne areas
4. Rinse after 10-15 minutes
5. 2-3 times weekly
6. Clears heat, detoxifies, treats acne

en.title: Moisturizing Skin Mask
en.instructions:
1. Mix all powders
2. Add honey and milk to form paste
3. Apply to face
4. Rinse after 15-20 minutes
5. 2-3 times weekly
6. Moisturizes, improves dryness

en.title: Anti-Aging Beauty Mask
en.instructions:
1. Mix all powders
2. Add honey to form paste
3. Apply to face
4. Rinse after 15-20 minutes
5. 1-2 times weekly
6. Anti-aging, beauty care

items: Clean face: Clean before applying mask
Avoid eye area: Eye skin is sensitive
Appropriate time: 15-20 minutes ideal
Moderate frequency: 2-3 times weekly
Allergy test: Test before first use
Combine with internal care: Best with both approaches
Choose quality herbs: Quality assurance
Fine grinding: Finer powder is better
Dry storage: Prevent moisture spoilage
Fresh preparation: Don't store too long
Personal constitution: Choose materials by constitution

en.text: Note: Herbal masks should be chosen based on personal constitution and skin condition. Recommend allergy test for first use. Avoid if skin is sensitive or inflamed. Consult TCM practitioner for suitable mask formula.
